hero.badge: Your life is now an RPG · Beta access open
hero.subtitle_main: Drink water, train, study, sleep early, and watch your character evolve, drop loot and face bosses.

what.title: The first RPG whose story is your life.
what.subtitle: Not just another habit checklist. It's a full personal progression system: attributes, classes, quests, bosses, loot and ranking. All driven by what you do in the real world.

cards.attrs_text: Strength, Mind, Charisma, Discipline and more. Every quest feeds the right attributes. See where you're strong and where you need training.
cards.missions_text: Set habits by day of the week. Skipped yesterday? The system tracks and deducts XP automatically. Nothing escapes.
cards.bosses_text: From Level 1 to 60. Each boss costs 'Boss Keys' you earn by completing quests. Discipline becomes combat power.
cards.streak_text: Flame calendar: each day with 60%+ quests done becomes a streak. Breaking hurts, keeping it is addictive.
cards.hp_text: Your character mirrors your health. Drink, eat right, sleep. The hero faints if you neglect yourself.
cards.rank_text: Compare your Power Level with adventurers worldwide. Climb by keeping your word.

diff.title: Most habit apps reward you for ticking boxes. LifeOnRPG charges you.
diff.subtitle: The difference is consequence. Here, ignoring a quest hurts the character, and that changes everything.

rows.punish_text: Forgot to log 'drink water' yesterday? The system deducts XP automatically. No excuses, no rewriting history.
rows.gold_text: Bosses drop Gold. Gold buys temporary buffs at the Time Shop. Rewards aren't cosmetic, they shape your next day.
rows.attrs_text: Every quest links to 1 main attribute and up to 2 secondary. You grow balanced, or learn where you're slacking.
rows.talk_text: Contextual notifications: 'You haven't drunk water for 4h', 'Streak at risk tonight', 'Boss unlocked'. Not spam, it's the character calling.
rows.class_text: 55 classes across 6 tiers. Your next class depends on what you prioritized. Warrior becomes Paladin only if you trained the Mind too.
rows.focus_text: No feed to scroll, no social notifications. Open the app, do your quests, close. Focus on what matters.

security.title: Your data is yours. Period.
security.subtitle: LifeOnRPG runs on the same infrastructure used by banks and fintechs, and nothing you log is accessible to third parties.

cards.tls_text: All communication between app and server uses HTTPS/TLS 1.3.
cards.rls_text: Each user only sees their own data. Enforced by database policies, no client-side bypass possible.
cards.track_text: No Facebook pixels, no invasive analytics. Only anonymous error metrics to keep the app stable.
cards.backup_text: Your progress is replicated and versioned. Nothing is lost, not by our bugs, not by changing phones.

roadmap.title: The realm is expanding.
roadmap.subtitle: You're on Beta access, everything new lands automatically in your account.

cards.ai_text: Smart advisor analyzes your habits and suggests personalized quests.
cards.habit_text: Addictions become bosses. Defeat 'Lord Procrastination' with consistent quests.
cards.party_text: Form a group with friends. Everyone must deliver to progress.
cards.loot_text: Expanded loot, crafting and weapons system with real attribute bonuses.

download.subtitle: Install the Android APK and get real-time notifications from your hero. Works offline, syncs on reconnect.

header.streak_desc: Consecutive days with ≥60% of daily quests completed.
header.protector_desc: Charges that prevent breaking the streak when failing a quest.
header.rest_desc: Recovers HP, MP and reduces fatigue after 15-60 min.
header.daily_reset: Daily reset processed: quests, meals, water and timers updated.

virtues.title: Virtues
virtues.subtitle: Weekly report of your quests — last 7 days
virtues.your_virtues_hint: Quests you completed the most this week
virtues.no_completed: No quest completed this week yet.
virtues.attention_points_hint: Quests you failed the most this week
virtues.table_legend: C = Completed on the day · R = Recovered (marked done after failing) · F = Failed
virtues.empty_state: No quest activity in the last 7 days. Start completing your daily quests to see your report here!

progress.xp_last_7_days: XP Gained in the Last 7 Days

mobile.hero_subtitle: Install the official Android app and keep your hero dashboard close at hand — with native notifications and offline mode.
mobile.security_tip_desc: After installation, you can disable "Unknown sources" again in Android settings.
mobile.iphone_desc: For now, iPhone uses the installable web version:
mobile.developer_desc: The project uses Capacitor. To build locally: export to GitHub, run

benefits.notifications_desc: Hero alerts directly on your lock screen.
benefits.offline_desc: Access your progress even without stable internet.
benefits.security_desc: Same encryption as the web version.

steps.s1_desc: Click the download button below. The .apk file will be saved to your phone's Downloads folder.
steps.s2_desc: Go to Settings → Security → enable 'Unknown sources' or 'Install unknown apps' for your browser.
steps.s3_desc: Use your phone's file manager, go to Downloads and tap the lifeonrpg.apk file.
steps.s4_desc: Confirm the installation. The app icon will appear on your home screen. Log in with the same account as the web version.

faq.q1_title: Is it safe to install the APK?
faq.q1_desc: Yes. The APK is compiled from the same source code as the web version and requests only the necessary permissions (notifications and local storage).
faq.q2_desc: No. Your progress is saved in the cloud. Just log in with the same account in the app.
faq.q3_title: When will it be on the Play Store?
faq.q3_desc: We are preparing the official release. For now, the direct APK is the fastest way to get the app on your phone.
faq.q4_desc: The iOS version is on the roadmap. For now, iPhones can use the installable web version (Add to Home Screen in Safari).

system_info.title: System Information
system_info.subtitle: Check recent updates and send ideas to improve the system.
system_info.feedback_message_placeholder: Describe your idea, bug, or improvement you would like to see in the system

auth.app_subtitle: Your life turned into an RPG
auth.notice_confirm_email: Please confirm your email to access the system.
auth.toast_email_not_confirmed_desc: Check your inbox and confirm your email.
auth.toast_reset_sent_desc: Check your email to reset your password.

health.notice_body: This feature is informational and does not replace medical consultation. Consult a healthcare professional.
health.upload_hint: Upload your exams for AI analysis
health.tip_1: Drink at least 2L of water per day
health.tip_2: Sleep between 7 and 9 hours per night
health.tip_3: Exercise at least 3 times a week
health.tip_5: Have regular check-ups with your doctor

shop.section_equip_quote: Items dropped from bosses. Equip for status bonuses.
shop.section_time_shop_quote: Temporary buffs bought with gold. Last 24h.

calendar.journal_placeholder: How was your day? Record your achievements, reflections and feelings...
calendar.chain_note: Each day with ≥60% of missions completed lights a flame 🔥

dashboard.streak_risk_body: Complete at least 60% of your missions today to keep the streak.
dashboard.daily_bonus_description: Complete missions to earn the daily bonus.
dashboard.coach_body: Complete your daily missions to evolve your attributes and level up faster!
dashboard.streak_risk_toast: ⚠️ Streak at risk today! Complete 60%+ of missions.

boss.dungeon_1_desc: A dungeon for those seeking to strengthen discipline and consistency.
boss.dungeon_2_desc: A mental challenge for curious and studious minds.
boss.dungeon_3_desc: An epic battle for warriors who train their body every day.
boss.power_level_desc: Ranking of the most powerful adventurers
boss.error_start_combat_desc: Could not start combat. Try again.

classes.locked_toast_desc: You need to be of this class to claim the reward.
classes.kit_received_desc: Check your new items in the inventory!

feats.points_hint: Earn points by completing missions and leveling up.

npc.page_subtitle: Interact with NPCs to earn special missions

priority.how_it_works_body: Create plans with linked missions. Each completed mission contributes to the plan's progress.

missions.welcome_back_body: Your pending missions were marked as failed. Review below.
missions.mission_created_desc: Your new mission has been added.
missions.tooltip_future: Mission scheduled for a future day

onboarding.success_desc: Your missions have been created. Good luck!
onboarding.step0_subtitle: Where your routine becomes an epic adventure
onboarding.feature1_desc: Your daily tasks become missions with XP, rewards and level progression.
onboarding.feature2_desc: Each completed habit increases your attributes — Strength, Intelligence, Wisdom and more.
onboarding.feature3_desc: Unfinished missions cost you XP. This makes consistency valuable.
onboarding.feature4_desc: Use your progress to fight bosses, buy items and interact with NPCs.
onboarding.step1_subtitle: This defines your regional ranking in the system.
onboarding.step2_title: Which class do you identify with?
onboarding.step2_subtitle: Your choice defines personalized starter missions for your routine.
onboarding.step3_subtitle: Select missions that make sense for your routine right now.
onboarding.missions_selected: mission(s) selected. You can create or edit missions later.
onboarding.step4_subtitle: Your journey as {{class}} is about to begin.
onboarding.tip_text: Start with a few habits and be consistent. You can add more missions at any time in Missions.

profile.xpHealthRewardMsg: You earned +35 XP for keeping your health up!
profile.healthChallengeCompleteToast: 🎉 Challenge Complete! +35 XP for keeping your health up!
profile.xpAlreadyCollectedToast: ⚠️ Bonus already collected. Come back tomorrow for more XP!
profile.tacticalSkillsDesc: Inspired by classic progression style, with original design and balancing. Each skill's power uses your attributes trained in missions.
profile.magicWeakNote: Magic this season is weaker by design. Hybrid builds with physical and tactical attributes tend to perform better.
profile.permanentClassDesc: Your starting class is permanent and cannot be changed after selection.
profile.bossStatusDesc: These statuses are shown in the skills area so you can decide which mission build to train before battle.
profile.attunementHint: Epic and Legendary items need to be attuned to activate status bonuses.
profile.starterKitDesc: Receive your first equipment to start the adventure (lv1–4).
profile.defeatBossesForItems: Defeat bosses to get new items!
profile.reachLevel5ForKit: Reach level 5 and select your class in "Classes" to receive your class kit!
profile.itemNoBonusWarning: This item grants no bonus until attuned.
profile.inventoryTip: 💡 Tip: Defeat bosses to earn rare equipment! The item marked as "BEST" has superior stats in the category.
profile.starterKitClaimedToast: 🎁 Novice Kit received! Check your inventory.
profile.attunementLimitToast: Attunement limit reached. Unatune an item to continue.
profile.sleepTimeHint: Your hero rests and recovers HP/MP.
profile.wakeTimeHint: Your hero wakes up and starts the day.
profile.noHeroFound: No hero found with this name.
profile.searchAboveHint: Search by name above to add!
profile.alreadyInClass: You are already in this class.
profile.permanentClassDesc2: Your starting class is permanent and cannot be changed after selection.

pricing.title: App access, with the plan that fits best.
pricing.subtitle: The R$ 4.90/month charge is for app access. You can pay monthly or purchase the annual plan directly.
pricing.access_plan_subtitle: Subscription to use the full app, not a separate premium add-on.
pricing.access_active_desc: Your app access is enabled and your journey can continue normally.
pricing.region_note: Equivalent price in USD, EUR, GBP and more — adapted to your region.

monthly.name: Monthly plan
monthly.desc: Pay month by month and keep full access to the app.

annual.name: Annual plan
annual.desc: Same monthly rate of R$ 4.90, but billed upfront annually.
annual.bonus: Annual bonus: 1 key that unlocks 2 free months for another user.

features.f6: 1 bonus 2-month key to gift another user

pricing.mor_note: Payments processed by Paddle.com (Merchant of Record).
